name: memor-re
description: Installable memor.re Council and product-operating workflows for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Council, delivery, handoff, and product-operating workflows for Codex.
interface.longDescription: Install memor.re's Codex workflows and connect compatible clients to the hosted memor.re MCP runtime. Normal users provide a memor.re plugin bearer credential; no platform checkout or MEMOR_RE_PLATFORM_ROOT is required.
defaultPrompt: Use memor.re Council to route this product decision.
Use letsgo to validate and ship this focused slice.
